# PyTorch 2.8 + CUDA 12.8 build (matches the bokehdepth conda env we used to
# develop BokehDepth). The +cu128 wheels bundle every CUDA runtime library they
# need under site-packages/nvidia/<pkg>/lib/ -- the activate.d hook shipped in
# env/activate.d/ adds those directories to LD_LIBRARY_PATH automatically.
--extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu128
torch==2.8.0+cu128
torchvision==0.23.0+cu128
torchaudio==2.8.0+cu128
xformers==0.0.32.post2
triton==3.4.0
cupy-cuda12x==13.6.0

# HuggingFace stack used by Stage-1 (Flux Kontext + bokeh LoRA adapter).
accelerate==1.10.1
diffusers==0.35.0
transformers==4.56.1
tokenizers==0.22.0
sentencepiece==0.2.1
huggingface-hub==0.34.4
hf-xet==1.1.5
safetensors==0.6.2
peft==0.17.1
timm==1.0.20

# Numerical / image stack used by both stages.
numpy==2.2.6
scipy==1.15.3
scikit-image==0.25.2
matplotlib==3.10.6
opencv-python==4.12.0
opencv-python-headless==4.12.0
pillow==10.4.0
pillow_heif==1.1.1
imageio==2.36.1
kornia==0.8.1
kornia_rs==0.1.9
einops==0.8.1
lpips==0.1.4
piq==0.8.0
h5py==3.11.0
tables==3.10.1
numexpr==2.13.1
blosc2==3.9.1
pandas==2.2.3
tifffile==2025.5.10

# Tracking / logging.
tensorboard==2.19.0
tensorboard-data-server==0.7.2
wandb==0.21.0
sentry-sdk==2.32.0
GitPython==3.1.44
gitdb==4.0.12

# Optimizers / misc.
prodigyopt==1.1.2
lion-pytorch==0.2.3
hydra-core==1.3.2
easydict==1.13
pycairo==1.28.0
torchmetrics==1.8.2

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# The following local CUDA extensions live inside the UniDepth/ subtree
# (UniDepth/unidepth/ops/{knn,extract_patches}). They are NOT required for
# the inference pipeline (Stage-1 + Stage-2 DSFA + Middlebury-style eval).
# If you want to run UniDepth training or the chamfer-distance / local-ssi
# losses, build them with:
#     cd UniDepth/unidepth/ops/knn            && python setup.py install
#     cd UniDepth/unidepth/ops/extract_patches && python setup.py install
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
